bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle for the panel art with child nodes for rank medal, time, shard count, and next-floor buttons.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_clear_rank_panel_480x270.png through AssetServer and instantiate it only after a floor clear result is confirmed.
runtime_notes: The panel should support Rank, Time, Shadow Shard count, and two action buttons without crowding.
Fade-in timing targets 0.6 seconds according to the GDD.
Keep the central medal area visually dominant so speed-rank feedback lands clearly.

context.usage: Floor-clear result panel showing the earned Shadow Rank, clear time, collected shards, and the next-floor or menu actions.

shape.silhouette: Large centered panel with a top medal crest, middle stat rows, and a bottom action-button rail.

acceptance_criteria: The panel reserves a clearly dominant crest area for the Shadow Rank medal and distinct rows for time and shard totals.
Two button-safe regions exist along the bottom edge for Next Floor and Menu actions.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds puzzle rules, object dimensions, HUD placement, and the Bevy 0.14 technical targets for Umbra Scale.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art-deco tower mood, silhouette layering, amber beam contrast, and architectural ornament rhythm.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Umbra silhouette proportions, eye-glow placement, and cloak-like shadow contours for player and echo scale checks.
